name: Drilling Tools International Corp
business: Drilling Tools International Corporation manufactures, rents, inspects, and refurbishes downhole drilling tools to companies in the oil and natural gas industry for bottom hole assemblies used in onshore and offshore horizontal and directional drilling. Revenue is derived from tool rental services and product sales. The company operates in two segments: Western Hemisphere and Eastern Hemisphere.
sellsTo: Customers in the United States, Canada, and globally

exposures.sentence: Demand for our services and products depends primarily upon the general level of activity in the oil and gas industry, including the number of active drilling rigs, the number of wells drilled, the depth and working pressure of these wells, the number of well completions, the level of well remediation activity, the volume of production and the corresponding capital spending by oil and natural gas companies.
